text:
# Carcavelos Daily Brief – Monday, May 18

**Consistent waist-high fun with light winds early, turning choppy by afternoon.**

**Morning (03:30–11:00):** Clean NNW wind under 7 km/h until 09:00 is your sweet spot. Waves hold 1.3m with swell gradually filling in from 0.8m to 1.3m. Go before 09:00 if you want glassy conditions; by 10:00 the wind's picked up to 12 km/h.

**Progression:** Wind steadily turns WNW from midday onwards, reaching 15+ km/h by 14:00. Swell peaks at 1.3m around 10:00, then slowly fades through afternoon. The chop becomes unavoidable after lunch.

**Afternoon (12:00–18:00):** Still rideable but windy and textured. Only worth it if you've got an afternoon-only window.

**Tips:** Get in early—6:00–08:30 is your golden window. Water's cold at 13°C, so 4/3 is minimum. Expect crowds mid-morning; beat the school run by 07:00.
